runner_cmd: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; Path(\"session_bootstrap/reports/openamp_wrapper_hook_replay_allow_20260314_001/runner_executed.txt\").write_text(\"runner-ok\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\"); print(\"runner-ok\")"
runner_cmd_shell_quoted: bash -lc 'python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; Path(\"session_bootstrap/reports/openamp_wrapper_hook_replay_allow_20260314_001/runner_executed.txt\").write_text(\"runner-ok\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\"); print(\"runner-ok\")"'
control_hook_cmd: python3 -c "import json, os; phase=os.environ.get(\"OPENAMP_PHASE\", \"\"); payload={\"phase\": phase}; payload.update({\"source\": \"replayed_live_status_resp\", \"transport_status\": \"status_resp_received\", \"protocol_semantics\": \"implemented\", \"note\": \"local replay of live STATUS_RESP evidence\"}) if phase == \"STATUS_REQ\" else payload.update({\"decision\": \"ALLOW\", \"source\": \"firmware_job_ack\", \"fault_code\": 0, \"fault_name\": \"NONE\", \"guard_state\": 2, \"guard_state_name\": \"JOB_ACTIVE\", \"transport_status\": \"job_ack_received\", \"protocol_semantics\": \"implemented\", \"note\": \"local replay of 2026-03-14 live JOB_ACK(ALLOW) evidence\"}) if phase == \"JOB_REQ\" else payload.update({\"source\": \"wrapper_local_replay\", \"note\": \"non-admission phase replay\"}); print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False))"
boundary_note: control plane only; the wrapped runner remains the existing inference data path
